message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant main
participant OsScheduler
participant Semaphore
participant TaskA
participant TaskB
participant System

main ->> OsScheduler: startOS
OsScheduler ->> TaskA: launch
TaskA ->> Semaphore: waitSemaphore
Semaphore ->> TaskA: callSystem
TaskA ->> System: setJump(buf)
System ->> Semaphore: reportSystemCall
Semaphore ->> OsScheduler: saveTaskContext
OsScheduler ->> TaskA: launch
TaskA ->> TaskB: waitSemaphore
TaskB ->> Semaphore: callSystem
Semaphore ->> System: reportSystemCall
System ->> OsScheduler: saveTaskContext
OsScheduler ->> TaskA: launch

@enduml
